/* ===== 学习进度标记 ===== */ .progress-dot { display: inline-block; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: #444; margin-right: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; transition: background 0.3s; } .progress-dot.done { background: #2ecc71; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(46, 204, 113, 0.6); }
